div.note: S/S–NSC Files, Lot 63 D 351, NSC 68 Series
div.head: Memorandum by the Executive Secretary of the National Security Council (Lay) to the Secretary of State and the Secretary of Defense (Marshall)
div.p: Subject: Joint Review of Politico-Military Strategy

References: A. NSC Actions Nos. 487, 424 and 393The actions under reference are described, respectively, in footnote 4, p. 88, footnote 2, p. 7, and footnote 4, p. 13.
B. Memo for Secretaries of State and Defense from Executive Secretary, same subject, dated December 14, 1950Not printed.
C. NSC 68 SeriesFor documentation on the NSC 68 series, see Foreign Relations, 1950, vol. i, pp. 126 ff.

The National Security Council, at its 93rd meetingJune 6, 1951. with the President presiding (NSC Action No. 487–b), noted the President’s amendment of the second sentence of his directive transmitted by the reference memorandum of December 14, 1950.

Accordingly, the revised directive by the President is transmitted as follows for appropriate action, and supersedes the President’s previous directive contained in the reference memorandum:
NSC 68/4 is approved as a working guide for the urgent purpose of making an immediate start. However, since this paper points out that the programs contained in it are not final, I hereby direct the Secretary of State and the Secretary of Defense to maintain a continuing joint review of the politico-military strategy of this Government.
This review is not to delay action upon the basis of NSC 68/4, the implementation of which by all appropriate departments and agencies of the United States Government is hereby directed.
